basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SVNIT JRF Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering and M.Tech in Structural Engineering/Earthquake Engineering/Construction Technology and Management with First Division. GATE/NET qualified.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential qualifications for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech. in Civil Engineering and an M.Tech. in Structural Engineering, Earthquake Engineering, or Construction Technology and Management with a First Division. GATE/NET qualification is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000/- per month, plus 16% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the JRF position at SVNIT?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: initial shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for this recruitment. Candidates from all categories can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is offered on a contract basis for a specific project duration.

faq.question: Q7. Which department or project is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a project at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT). Specific project details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Surat, Gujarat. While there are no explicit restrictions mentioned for out-of-state candidates, they should be prepared to relocate if selected.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the application link (email) are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
